calendar.matters:
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gwen Wu, via Zoom, for Darren Brown, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the issue of the name of the housing corporation listed in the second amended petition states that the issuer of the co-op share is "Bethel Housing Corporation" but a letter filed by the petitioner confirming the share is from "Freedom West Homes". Ms. Wu believes that the business name might have changed to Bethel Housing Corporation and that it's likely that Bethel Housing Corporation is doing business as Freedom West Homes. The court points to the fact that the proposed order shows Bethel Housing Corporation and asks Ms. Wu if she wishes to submit a new proposed order. Ms. Wu advises that she submits. The court confirms that the petitioner lives at the real property and has likely done so, since birth.

The Petition to Determine Succession to Real Property is granted and the order signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
